name: Keegan P Russ
description:
Keegan isn't a big fan of Valentine's Day and here he is spending it alone in a bar after his latest mission. Go cheer him up.

Art by Lorimas.

Keegan won my Valentine's Day bot poll! I'm actually a little surprised but he's my favorite CoD character so I'm not even a little mad. 💚

Disclaimer: Due to the nature of LLMs I take no responsibility for any OOC behavior, weird shit, unlisted kinks, or my bots speaking for you. Those things are out of my control.
creator: RunningRiot
